task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in using the demo_provider account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem interface is visible, and the top navigation or dashboard indicates the user is logged in as 'demo_provider' or is operating under 'Hillside Family Medicine'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the chart for patient Ezequiel Hermiston.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active patient chart or patient header displays the name 'Ezequiel Hermiston' and DOB 'May 19, 2002' (or '2002-05-19').

task_completion.description: Verify the referral is directed to a Cardiologist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the add referral form, the 'Specialty' or 'Referred To' field contains the text 'Cardiologist'.

task_completion.description: Verify the evaluation reason is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the referral form, the 'Evaluation', 'Diagnosis', or 'For' field contains the exact text 'chest pain and palpitations'.

task_completion.description: Verify the detailed reason for the referral is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the referral form, the 'Reason', 'Notes', or 'Comments' field contains the exact text 'Chest pain with exertion and palpitations, rule out cardiac etiology.'

task_completion.description: Verify the referral was successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Referral saved' or 'Referral added') is visible, or the newly created referral to a Cardiologist appears in the patient's list of active referrals.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the NOSH ChartingSystem via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser interface navigating the NOSH web application, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the referral details into the actual application form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text for the referral is typed into the designated input fields within the NOSH web interface, not into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the referral creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open in the screenshots, ensuring the success message or referral list is genuine.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Ezequiel Hermiston (PID 7, DOB: 2002-05-19). Provider account: 'demo_provider' at 'Hillside Family Medicine'.
